authority: Local models REVIEW only; all committed code is human-authored deterministic templates and tested.

findings.finding: Manufacturing lacks traceability / predictive maintenance / IoT.
findings.action: Recorded; not required for ERPNext-grade local depth this sprint.

findings.finding: Reports lack BI / ML analytics / customizable dashboards.
findings.action: Query-based reports only; BI/print-designer is a known parity gap.
Budgeting module noted as a future parity item.

findings.finding: Incorrect moving-average costing with multiple batches / partial orders.
findings.action: Moving-average across two receipts is tested (Scenario_inventory_issue_uses_moving_average); partial-production-run costing edge added to backlog.

findings.finding: Production status not transitioning correctly to Completed.
findings.action: ManufacturingTests assert the full Draft->MaterialsIssued->QualityPassed->Completed transition + immutability.

findings.finding: Transfer fails to decrement the source warehouse.
findings.action: Scenario_inventory_transfer_conserves_total_qty asserts source decrement + destination increment = conserved total.

outcome: No accepted finding contradicts the honest scoring. Two new backlog items (partial-run costing edge, budgeting/BI); the architect's correctness concerns (status transitions, transfer decrement) are already covered by tests.
